task_completion.description: Agent opens the import dialog in Subsurface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file selection dialog for importing dive logs (e.g., 'Import log files' or 'Import') is visible over the Subsurface main window.

task_completion.description: Agent selects the correct file to import.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'import_dives.ssrf' in the Documents folder is highlighted, or its path is entered in the file name field of the import dialog.

task_completion.description: Agent successfully imports the dives into the current log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Subsurface window displays an updated, longer list of dives in the dive list panel, indicating the new dives from the imported file have been added to the existing ones.

task_completion.description: Agent opens the save dialog to save the combined log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Save' file dialog is visible over the Subsurface main window.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the combined dive log to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save dialog shows 'dives.ssrf' in the Documents directory as the target file name, or the Subsurface window title confirms the file is saved as 'dives.ssrf' (often indicated by the removal of an unsaved changes asterisk).

integrity.description: Agent used the Subsurface graphical user interface to perform the import and save operations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Subsurface menus (e.g., File -> Import, File -> Save As) rather than terminal commands merging files.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a text editor to manually merge the XML/SSRF files.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) are seen open with the dive log contents.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine Subsurface application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Subsurface application window is clearly visible and used for the task, matching its standard interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The main dive log file is located at /home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf and the log file to be imported is at /home/ga/Documents/import_dives.ssrf.
